title: Matourea scutellarioides
taxonomy: Matourea scutellarioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of South America, specifically in Brazil and Peru. It belongs to the genus Matourea, which consists of several species of plants. The classification of Matourea scutellarioides is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Malpighiales, family Malpighiaceae, genus Matourea, and species M. scutellarioides. Further research may be necessary for a more detailed and accurate classification.
